text: AI is increasingly common in the modern workplace. One major benefit is automation, which handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling. This frees up employees to focus on more creative or complex work. Productivity tools, such as smart email assistants or project management apps, help people work faster and with fewer errors. However, AI is not replacing all jobs. Instead, we see a growing trend of human-AI collaboration, where humans make strategic decisions while AI provides insights from large amounts of data. This partnership changes certain job roles, requiring workers to learn new skills like data analysis or AI management. Adapting to these changes is essential for career growth.
